output:
Muthu Subramanian's key skills can be summarized as follows:

Muthu Subramanian is a seasoned expert in building scalable enterprise-grade platforms, with a strong background in Python programming and AI architecture [SOURCE-1]. His expertise spans multiple areas, including data analytics, intelligent automation, and GenAI-enabled systems.

Some of his key skills include:
• Developing secure, on-prem and cloud-hybrid GenAI Python Programming solutions aligned with financial-grade compliance requirements [SOURCE-2].
• Building automation platforms supporting AML & Compliance E-mail Assurance, leveraging tools like RAG for policy-based response filtering [SOURCE-2].
• Designing and implementing GenAI-powered document intelligence pipelines for compliance review, reducing manual analysis effort [SOURCE-1].
• Leading the development of LLM-based assistants for API Development internal workflows using vector search and policy-based response filtering [SOURCE-2].
• Introducing agent-based AI workflows to Agile Methodology for document screening, validation, and decision support [SOURCE-2].

Takeaway: Muthu Subramanian's expertise lies in developing secure, scalable, and efficient GenAI-powered solutions for compliance and automation.
